hook: You can save yourself a lot of bad dates by noticing how a profile makes you feel before you rationalize it.
body: Profiles often create an immediate sense of ease, confusion, warmth, distance, or volatility long before you can explain why.
voices: Vanessa Van Edwards, The School of Life

hook: Men often override that early read because they want the profile to be promising badly enough.
body: Your first impression is not sacred, but it is still useful raw data.
voices: Vanessa Van Edwards, The School of Life

hook: Your first impression is not sacred, but it is still useful raw data.
body: If a profile feels performative, contemptuous, or impossible to read, that reaction may be worth respecting.
voices: Vanessa Van Edwards, The School of Life

hook: If a profile feels performative, contemptuous, or impossible to read, that reaction may be worth respecting.
body: Notice your first clean impression before you start persuading yourself to ignore it.
